interfaces.name: CadenceTier
interfaces.signature: enum CadenceTier: String, Codable, Sendable, CaseIterable { case close, regular, occasional; var days: Int { get } }
interfaces.notes: close=14, regular=42, occasional=180. Locked in detailed_discussion.

interfaces.name: WarmthState
interfaces.signature: enum WarmthState: String, Codable, Sendable { case warm, cooling, cold }
interfaces.notes: warm<1.0, cooling 1.0-<1.5, cold>=1.5. Never stored, always derived at read time.

interfaces.name: InteractionKind
interfaces.signature: enum InteractionKind: String, Sendable { case note, outreach }
interfaces.notes: Used for timeline rendering and ritual logging semantics.

interfaces.name: RitualResolution
interfaces.signature: enum RitualResolution: String, Sendable { case unresolved, loggedOutreach, snoozed, archived }
interfaces.notes: Persisted on ritual session items to support resume and completion summary.

interfaces.name: SubscriptionState
interfaces.signature: enum SubscriptionState: Sendable { case free, subscribed(expiration: Date?), unavailable }
interfaces.notes: UI may render paywall and settings from this state; entitlement checks still re-query live when gating.

interfaces.name: CreatePersonInput
interfaces.signature: struct CreatePersonInput: Sendable { let name: String; let cadence: CadenceTier; let firstNoteBody: String; let keyFact: String?; let openLoop: String? }
interfaces.notes: Single fast-capture payload for onboarding and add-person sheet.

interfaces.name: LogInteractionInput
interfaces.signature: struct LogInteractionInput: Sendable { let personID: UUID; let kind: InteractionKind; let body: String; let keyFact: String?; let openLoop: String? }
interfaces.notes: Used by person detail and ritual action flow.

interfaces.name: PersonSnapshot
interfaces.signature: struct PersonSnapshot: Identifiable, Sendable, Equatable { let id: PersonID; var name: String; var createdAt: Date; var lastInteractionAt: Date; var cadence: CadenceTier; var isArchived: Bool; var snoozedUntil: Date? }
interfaces.notes: Plain value returned across the repository boundary; UI/domain never touch PersistentModel.

interfaces.name: InteractionSnapshot
interfaces.signature: struct InteractionSnapshot: Sendable, Identifiable { let id: UUID; let personID: UUID; let kind: InteractionKind; let body: String; let keyFact: String?; let openLoop: String?; let createdAt: Date }
interfaces.notes: Timeline and explanation generation depend on this shape.

interfaces.name: WarmthEvaluation
interfaces.signature: public struct WarmthEvaluation: Sendable, Hashable { public let ratio: Double; public let state: WarmthState; public let explanation: String; public init(ratio: Double, state: WarmthState, explanation: String) }
interfaces.notes: Holds derived relationship warmth and natural language explanation.

interfaces.name: AttentionItem
interfaces.signature: struct AttentionItem: Sendable, Identifiable { let id: UUID; let person: PersonSnapshot; let evaluation: WarmthEvaluation; let lastInteraction: InteractionSnapshot?; let isSnoozed: Bool }
interfaces.notes: Sorted queue item shared by dashboard and ritual session creation.

interfaces.name: AttentionQueue
interfaces.signature: struct AttentionQueue: Sendable { let dueItems: [AttentionItem]; let cappedItems: [AttentionItem]; let hiddenDueCount: Int; let totalDueCount: Int; let freePreviewLimit: Int; let sessionCap: Int }
interfaces.notes: Encodes both the top-3 paywall boundary and the hard ritual cap of 10.

interfaces.name: RitualSessionItemSnapshot
interfaces.signature: struct RitualSessionItemSnapshot: Identifiable, Sendable, Equatable { let id: UUID; let personID: PersonID; let orderIndex: Int; let ratioAtEntry: Double; let stateAtEntry: WarmthState; let explanationAtEntry: String; var resolution: ResolutionStatus }
interfaces.notes: orderIndex is mandatory — SwiftData relationship arrays don't guarantee order across relaunch.

interfaces.name: RitualSessionSnapshot
interfaces.signature: struct RitualSessionSnapshot: Identifiable, Sendable, Equatable { let id: UUID; let createdAt: Date; var completedAt: Date?; var items: [RitualSessionItemSnapshot] }
interfaces.notes: At most one row with completedAt == nil at a time.

interfaces.name: DateProviding
interfaces.signature: protocol DateProviding: Sendable { var now: Date { get } }
interfaces.notes: Injected into domain and services; debug time-travel swaps the concrete implementation.

interfaces.name: RelationshipRepository
interfaces.signature: @MainActor protocol RelationshipRepository { func fetchActivePeople() async throws -> [PersonSnapshot]; func fetchArchivedPeople() async throws -> [PersonSnapshot]; func fetchPerson(id: PersonID) async throws -> PersonSnapshot?; func fetchNotes(for personID: PersonID) async throws -> [NoteSnapshot]; func fetchMostRecentNoteByPerson() async throws -> [PersonID: NoteSnapshot]; func addPerson(name: String, cadence: CadenceTier, firstNote: String, keyFact: String?, openLoop: String?, at date: Date) async throws -> PersonID; func logOutreach(personID: PersonID, text: String, keyFact: String?, openLoop: String?, at date: Date) async throws; func snoozePerson(_ personID: PersonID, until date: Date) async throws; func archivePerson(_ personID: PersonID) async throws; func unarchivePerson(_ personID: PersonID) async throws; func deletePersonPermanently(_ personID: PersonID) async throws; func deleteAllData() async throws; func nameCollisionExists(for proposedName: String, excluding personID: PersonID?) async throws -> Bool; func fetchUnresolvedRitualSession() async throws -> RitualSessionSnapshot?; func createRitualSession(_ session: RitualSessionSnapshot) async throws; func resolveRitualItem(sessionID: UUID, personID: PersonID, resolution: ResolutionStatus, at date: Date) async throws; func completeRitualSession(sessionID: UUID, at date: Date) async throws }
interfaces.notes: Operation-specific by design: invariants (required first note, lastInteractionAt bump on outreach, duplicate check) live in one place, not scattered across view models. Protocol lives in NurtureDomain; concrete SwiftData implementation lives in NurtureData.

interfaces.name: WarmthCalculator.evaluate
interfaces.signature: static func evaluate(person: PersonSnapshot, mostRecentNote: NoteSnapshot?, asOf referenceDate: Date, calendar: Calendar) -> WarmthAssessment
interfaces.notes: Pure, Foundation-only. If this file imports SwiftData, that's a defect.

interfaces.name: AttentionQueueBuilder.build
interfaces.signature: func build(people: [PersonSnapshot], interactionsByPerson: [UUID: [InteractionSnapshot]], asOf: Date, calendar: Calendar, freePreviewLimit: Int, sessionCap: Int) -> AttentionQueue
interfaces.notes: Computes inclusion, sort order, truncation counts, and paywall teaser boundary deterministically.

interfaces.name: RitualSessionService
interfaces.signature: protocol RitualSessionService: Sendable { @MainActor func resumableSession() throws -> RitualSessionSnapshot?; @MainActor func startSession(from queue: AttentionQueue, asOf: Date) throws -> RitualSessionSnapshot; @MainActor func resolve(sessionID: UUID, personID: UUID, resolution: RitualResolution, resolvedAt: Date, snoozeUntil: Date?) throws -> RitualSessionSnapshot; @MainActor func complete(sessionID: UUID, completedAt: Date) throws }
interfaces.notes: Persists the frozen ritual snapshot and per-item resolution state across relaunch.

interfaces.name: EntitlementService
interfaces.signature: @MainActor protocol EntitlementService: AnyObject { var current: Entitlement { get }; func refresh() async; func purchase(productID: String) async throws; func restorePurchases() async throws; func startObservingTransactions() }
interfaces.notes: StoreKit 2-backed; transaction observation is an in-process Task at launch, no Background Modes.

interfaces.name: AuthService
interfaces.signature: protocol AuthService: Sendable { @MainActor func unlockApp() async -> Bool; @MainActor func reauthenticate(reason: String) async -> Bool }
interfaces.notes: Used for launch lock plus fresh auth before export and permanent delete; cancel is treated as no-op.

interfaces.name: ExportPayload
interfaces.signature: struct ExportPayload: Sendable { let schemaVersion: String; let exportedAt: Date; let people: [PersonSnapshot]; let interactions: [InteractionSnapshot]; let ritualSessions: [RitualSessionSnapshot] }
interfaces.notes: Versioned JSON export shape; never dump raw SwiftData models.

interfaces.name: ExportService
interfaces.signature: protocol ExportService: Sendable { func buildExport() async throws -> ExportDocumentV1 }
interfaces.notes: Called only after fresh re-auth and on-screen unencrypted-file warning.

interfaces.name: NotificationScheduling
interfaces.signature: protocol NotificationScheduling: Sendable { @MainActor func requestAuthorizationIfNeeded() async -> Bool; @MainActor func syncWeeklyReminder(nextEligibleDate: Date?) async }
interfaces.notes: Should-have feature only; denial must degrade to in-app reminders without breaking the main flow.

interfaces.name: AppDependencies
interfaces.signature: struct AppDependencies { let repository: RelationshipRepository; let dateProvider: DateProvider; let authService: AuthenticationService; let entitlementService: EntitlementService; let notificationScheduler: NotificationScheduler; let exportService: ExportService }
interfaces.notes: Injected once at app root via environment.

interfaces.name: AppRoute
interfaces.signature: enum AppRoute: Hashable { case personDetail(UUID); case settings; case archivedPeople }
interfaces.notes: NavigationStack path contract; modal surfaces stay out of the route enum.

interfaces.name: AppRouter
interfaces.signature: @MainActor @Observable final class AppRouter { var path: [Route]; var addPersonPresented: Bool; var ritualPresented: Bool; var paywallSource: PaywallSource? }
interfaces.notes: Owns all push/modal presentation state; nothing else may present navigation.

interfaces.name: ResolutionStatus
interfaces.signature: enum ResolutionStatus: Codable, Sendable, Equatable { case unresolved; case loggedOutreach(noteID: UUID); case snoozed(until: Date); case archived }
interfaces.notes: Per-ritual-item outcome, persisted so an interrupted session resumes with exact progress.

interfaces.name: PersonID
interfaces.signature: struct PersonID: Hashable, Codable, Sendable { let rawValue: UUID }
interfaces.notes: Canonical identity everywhere above SwiftData; lives in NurtureDomain (Foundation-only target).

interfaces.name: NoteSnapshot
interfaces.signature: struct NoteSnapshot: Identifiable, Sendable, Equatable { let id: UUID; let personID: PersonID; var text: String; var createdAt: Date; var keyFact: String?; var openLoop: String? }
interfaces.notes: Timeline item; source for why-now explanation anchors.

interfaces.name: WarmthAssessment
interfaces.signature: struct WarmthAssessment: Sendable, Equatable { let ratio: Double; let state: WarmthState; let explanation: String }
interfaces.notes: Live-derived output shared by dashboard, ritual snapshot capture, and detail screen.

interfaces.name: WarmthCalculator
interfaces.signature: enum WarmthCalculator { static func assess(person: PersonSnapshot, mostRecentNote: NoteSnapshot?, asOf date: Date, calendar: Calendar) -> WarmthAssessment }
interfaces.notes: Agreed in spirit by both; exact parameter list (single most-recent note vs. full notes array) differs between the two proposals and needs picking.

interfaces.name: QueueEntry
interfaces.signature: struct QueueEntry: Identifiable, Sendable, Equatable { var id: PersonID { personID }; let personID: PersonID; let assessment: WarmthAssessment }
interfaces.notes: Single source for ranked attention/ritual queue membership.

interfaces.name: VisibleQueue
interfaces.signature: struct VisibleQueue: Sendable, Equatable { let visible: [QueueEntry]; let hiddenCount: Int }
interfaces.notes: Shared entitlement-truncated shape so dashboard teaser and ritual reveal-in-place cannot drift.

interfaces.name: AttentionQueueBuilder
interfaces.signature: enum AttentionQueueBuilder { static func buildQueue(people: [PersonSnapshot], mostRecentNoteByPerson: [PersonID: NoteSnapshot], asOf date: Date, calendar: Calendar, cap: Int) -> [QueueEntry]; static func applyEntitlement(to queue: [QueueEntry], isSubscribed: Bool, freeLimit: Int) -> VisibleQueue }
interfaces.notes: MISSING from Gemini's contract — this is a real gap, not a naming difference. Needs explicit adoption or an equivalent next round.

interfaces.name: PersonRecord
interfaces.signature: @Model final class PersonRecord { var id: UUID; var name: String; var createdAt: Date; var lastInteractionAt: Date; var cadenceRaw: String; var isArchived: Bool; var snoozedUntil: Date?; @Relationship(deleteRule: .cascade) var notes: [NoteRecord] }
interfaces.notes: Lives only in NurtureData target.

interfaces.name: NoteRecord
interfaces.signature: @Model final class NoteRecord { var id: UUID; var personID: UUID; var text: String; var createdAt: Date; var keyFact: String?; var openLoop: String? }
interfaces.notes: Fetched via one grouped FetchDescriptor sorted by createdAt for fetchMostRecentNoteByPerson, never N per-person queries.

interfaces.name: RitualSessionRecord
interfaces.signature: @Model final class RitualSessionRecord { var id: UUID; var createdAt: Date; var completedAt: Date?; @Relationship(deleteRule: .cascade) var items: [RitualSessionItemRecord] }
interfaces.notes: Persisted frozen session for interrupt/resume.

interfaces.name: RitualSessionItemRecord
interfaces.signature: @Model final class RitualSessionItemRecord { var id: UUID; var personID: UUID; var orderIndex: Int; var ratioAtEntry: Double; var stateRaw: String; var explanationAtEntry: String; var resolutionRaw: String; var resolvedAt: Date?; var snoozeUntilIfSnoozed: Date? }
interfaces.notes: Must always be fetched sorted by orderIndex; never trust relationship-array order.

interfaces.name: ContainerLocating
interfaces.signature: protocol ContainerLocating: Sendable { func resolveDatabaseURL() -> URL }
interfaces.notes: Only in Claude's proposal; Gemini describes the App Group fallback in prose but doesn't formalize an injectable protocol for testing it.

interfaces.name: DateProvider
interfaces.signature: protocol DateProvider: Sendable { func now() -> Date }
interfaces.notes: Injectable clock powering domain logic, debug time travel, and relock timing.

interfaces.name: AuthenticationService
interfaces.signature: protocol AuthenticationService: Sendable { var biometricsOrPasscodeEnrolled: Bool { get }; func authenticate(reason: String) async -> Result<Void, NurtureError> }
interfaces.notes: Wraps LocalAuthentication deviceOwnerAuthentication; distinguishes cancel vs failure via NurtureError.

interfaces.name: Entitlement
interfaces.signature: enum Entitlement: Sendable, Equatable { case free; case subscribed(expiresAt: Date?) }
interfaces.notes: Richer than a flat bool so UI/tests express real transitions.

interfaces.name: NotificationScheduler
interfaces.signature: protocol NotificationScheduler: Sendable { func requestAuthorizationIfNeeded() async -> Bool; func scheduleWeeklyReminder(on weekday: Int, hour: Int, minute: Int) async throws; func cancelWeeklyReminder() async }
interfaces.notes: Should-have; denied state falls back to in-app badge/banner.

interfaces.name: ExportDocumentV1
interfaces.signature: struct ExportDocumentV1: Codable, Sendable { let schemaVersion: Int; let exportedAt: Date; let people: [PersonSnapshot]; let notes: [NoteSnapshot] }
interfaces.notes: Versioned plaintext export payload; never export raw SwiftData models.

interfaces.name: Route
interfaces.signature: enum Route: Hashable { case personDetail(PersonID); case settings; case archivedPeople }
interfaces.notes: Carries PersonID, never PersistentIdentifier.

interfaces.name: PaywallSource
interfaces.signature: enum PaywallSource: Identifiable { case dashboardTeaser; case ritualOverflow; var id: String { get } }
interfaces.notes: Single source of truth for paywall presentation and copy variant; no separate presentPaywall boolean.

interfaces.name: AttentionCardActions
interfaces.signature: enum AttentionCardActions { case navigate(() -> Void); case ritual(onLog: () -> Void, onSnooze: () -> Void, onArchive: () -> Void) }
interfaces.notes: Parameterizes the one shared AttentionCard view without boolean-flag sprawl.

interfaces.name: NurtureError
interfaces.signature: enum NurtureError: Error, Equatable { case persistenceFailure(String); case authenticationCancelled; case authenticationFailed; case entitlementUnavailable; case exportFailed(String); case invalidSnoozeDate }
interfaces.notes: Unified error surface mapped to inline empty/error screen states, not raw system alerts.

interfaces.name: PrivacyShieldState
interfaces.signature: @MainActor @Observable final class PrivacyShieldState { var isShielded: Bool; func handle(scenePhase: ScenePhase, now: Date) }
interfaces.notes: Root-level testable app-switcher privacy mask, ~2min relock grace.

interfaces.name: DebugClock
interfaces.signature: #if DEBUG final class DebugClock: DateProvider { var override: Date?; func advance(by component: Calendar.Component, value: Int); func set(_ date: Date?); func now() -> Date } #endif
interfaces.notes: Discrete jumps only, no scrubber; compiled out of Release entirely, verified absent from a Release archive.

interfaces.name: PersonDTO
interfaces.signature: public struct PersonDTO: Sendable, Hashable, Identifiable { public let id: UUID; public let name: String; public let createdAt: Date; public let lastInteractionAt: Date; public let cadence: CadenceTier; public let isArchived: Bool; public let snoozeUntil: Date?; public init(id: UUID, name: String, createdAt: Date, lastInteractionAt: Date, cadence: CadenceTier, isArchived: Bool, snoozeUntil: Date?) }
interfaces.notes: Thread-safe representation of a Person record.

interfaces.name: NoteDTO
interfaces.signature: public struct NoteDTO: Sendable, Hashable, Identifiable { public let id: UUID; public let personId: UUID; public let text: String; public let createdAt: Date; public let keyFact: String?; public let openLoop: String?; public init(id: UUID, personId: UUID, text: String, createdAt: Date, keyFact: String?, openLoop: String?) }
interfaces.notes: Thread-safe representation of an interaction note.

interfaces.name: RitualSessionItemDTO
interfaces.signature: public struct RitualSessionItemDTO: Sendable, Hashable, Identifiable { public let id: UUID; public let personId: UUID; public let warmthRatioAtEntry: Double; public let warmthStateAtEntry: WarmthState; public let explanationAtEntry: String; public let resolution: ResolutionStatus; public init(id: UUID, personId: UUID, warmthRatioAtEntry: Double, warmthStateAtEntry: WarmthState, explanationAtEntry: String, resolution: ResolutionStatus) }
interfaces.notes: Captured snapshot item of a person in a ritual review.

interfaces.name: RitualSessionDTO
interfaces.signature: public struct RitualSessionDTO: Sendable, Hashable, Identifiable { public let id: UUID; public let createdAt: Date; public let completedAt: Date?; public let items: [RitualSessionItemDTO]; public init(id: UUID, createdAt: Date, completedAt: Date?, items: [RitualSessionItemDTO]) }
interfaces.notes: Persisted weekly review session snapshot.

interfaces.name: LocalAuthenticationService
interfaces.signature: public protocol LocalAuthenticationService: Sendable { var isBiometricsEnrolled: Bool { get }; func authenticateUser(reason: String) async -> Result<Void, Error> }
interfaces.notes: Abstraction for biometric/passcode device verification.

interfaces.name: SchemaV1
interfaces.signature: enum SchemaV1: VersionedSchema { static var versionIdentifier: Schema.Version; static var models: [any PersistentModel.Type] }
interfaces.notes: Versioned from first commit; no CloudKit-backed ModelConfiguration anywhere.

interfaces.name: AttentionQueueBuilder.buildQueue
interfaces.signature: static func buildQueue(people: [PersonSnapshot], mostRecentNotes: [PersonID: NoteSnapshot], asOf referenceDate: Date, calendar: Calendar, cap: Int) -> [QueueEntry]
interfaces.notes: Ranked queue for both dashboard and ritual entry from one code path.

interfaces.name: AttentionQueueBuilder.applyEntitlement
interfaces.signature: static func applyEntitlement(to queue: [QueueEntry], entitlement: Entitlement, freeLimit: Int) -> VisibleQueue
interfaces.notes: Single authority for the 3-vs-4 teaser boundary and mid-ritual reveal-in-place; never duplicated in view code.

interfaces.name: RitualSessionFactory.makeSnapshot
interfaces.signature: static func makeSnapshot(from queue: [QueueEntry], createdAt: Date) -> RitualSessionSnapshot
interfaces.notes: Freezes membership, order, and explanation text at ritual entry.

interfaces.name: StorageDirectoryProviding
interfaces.signature: protocol StorageDirectoryProviding: Sendable { func databaseURL() throws -> URL }
interfaces.notes: Abstracts App Group vs Application Support fallback so both paths are unit-testable.
